title: The Big Picture 2021 In Review Pt1
section_path: The Big Picture 2021 In Review Pt1
section_path_text: The Big Picture 2021 In Review Pt1
summary:
Main
By Nick Ristic
The Capes
As the year draws to a close, we review the wild ride that has been the Cape market in 2021. We've seen multi-year highs for freight and commodity prices, and with 2022 looming, the market remains on good, albeit volatile, footing. Ramping up
2021 started with an unseasonable jump in Cape rates in January, boosted by a surge in congestion in the Far East (a recurring theme this year).
